CustomObject.description: Used by the batch job "BD_Batch_OrgLimitChecker". Defines what Org Limits to check and at what threshold to send an email alert. The Limit API names can be found here: https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/atlas.en-us.256.0.api_rest.meta/api_rest/resources_limits.htm
CustomObject.label: Org Limit Check
